title: galeopsis ladanum subsp. intermedia
intro: Galeopsis ladanum subsp. intermedia, also known as intermediate gale of gaul, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Galeopsis ladanum subsp. intermedia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
